headline: Ulta Beauty Extends Reach With Delivery Wellness And Data Partnerships
summary: Ulta Beauty (NasdaqGS:ULTA) has partnered with Uber Eats to offer nationwide on-demand delivery of beauty products. The company is adding AG1 to its assortment, extending Ulta Beauty's reach into wellness products. Ulta Beauty has launched a new collaboration with YipitData to use data analytics for merchandising and customer strategy. Ulta Beauty operates as a specialty beauty retailer, combining stores, e-commerce, and services in one platform. The new partnerships with Uber Eats, AG1,...

headline: Ulta (ULTA) Stock Trades Down, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of beauty, cosmetics, and personal care retailer Ulta Beauty (NASDAQ:ULTA) fell 1.9% in the afternoon session after April CPI hit 3.8%, the highest reading in nearly three years, confirming that tariffs and oil would show up in store prices.
